name: Impossible Turkey and Stuffing Pie
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup sliced green onions with tops
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Grease a 9-inch pie plate.
3. Arrange the diced turkey in the center of the greased pie plate and sprinkle with seasoned salt.
4. Scatter the stuffing evenly over the turkey.
5. Sprinkle sliced green onions and peas on top of the stuffing.
6. In a blender, beat eggs until smooth for about 15 seconds. Pour into the pie plate.
7. Bake in the preheated oven for 30-35 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Let cool for 5 minutes before serving with hot turkey gravy. Serves 6.
FROM BISQUICK RECIPE CLUB. LISA CRAWLEY TSPN00B Judy
